query: When does it make sense to hire someone instead of doing it yourself?
direct_answer: To decorate a hotel room for a romantic surprise, focus on one strong mood, keep the decor controlled, and plan around room access and timing. If the setup needs to be ready before arrival, hiring a local decorator can remove a lot of friction.
best_for: This page is for someone planning a romantic surprise and trying to decide what actually matters in the room versus what just creates clutter.
not_for: Requests outside the Memphis metro service area, full-service vendor coordination, or services Porch & Party does not offer by default.
